name: chief-engineer-blitz
summary: Doctrine for orchestrated multi-PR blitz delivery against a decomposable objective — six phases (Plan / Spec / Implement / Triage / Validate / Closure), strict critic-finding triage, real exit-criteria validation.

REPO_NAME.description: Display name of the consumer repo (e.g. 'Dark Factory Platform').

REPO_SLUG.source: darkfactory.yaml: repo.slug, or git remote inference

OWNER_REPO.description: GitHub `<owner>/<repo>` reference for the consumer (used in gh commands).
OWNER_REPO.source: git remote get-url origin (inferred), or darkfactory.yaml: repo.ownerRepo

CYCLE_DOCS_DIR.description: Repo-relative path to the cycle-docs directory.

ADR_DIR.description: Repo-relative path to the ADR directory.

WORKTREE_ROOT.description: Repo-relative path where parallel agent worktrees are created.

QUALITY_GATE_TARGETS.description: Newline-separated Make-target commands for the consumer's quality gate (used in spec for implementation prompts).

AGENT_COMMITTER_ORG.description: Org used in the agentic-committer email convention (claude-code+<handle>@<org>.ai).
